items.title: U.S. inflation, Polkadot upgrade, Solstice-Kamino announcement: Crypto Week Ahead
items.summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 9.

items.title: Coinbase launches perpetual futures in a European regulatory minefield
items.summary: Coinbase launched regulated crypto and equity index futures for Advanced users in 26 European countries as the ESMA sharpens scrutiny of perpetual-style products.

items.title: Bitcoin rises as oil spikes, equities drop
items.summary: Bitcoin climbed during European trading hours even as U.S. equity futures, gold and silver fell, highlighting its relative resilience to oil shocks and war risks.

items.title: Crypto funds gain $619M as markets hold up despite oil and war fears
items.summary: Bitcoin ETPs turned green year-to-date with $521 million inflows last week, as total crypto assets rebounded despite geopolitical tensions linked to Iran.

items.title: Biggest oil supply shock ever: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
items.summary: Bitcoin faced two death crosses and the total failure of the $74,000 BTC price breakout headed into the second week of March as the US-Iran conflict raged.

items.title: Oil retreats from 25% surge as G7 weighs emergency reserve release
items.summary: Bitcoin rebounded from around $65,725 to nearly $68,000 as oil pulled back from its 25% Sunday spike above $117 and market jitters eased.

items.title: Nigel Farage takes 6% stake in UK bitcoin treasury firm Stack BTC
items.summary: Reform UK leader backs London-listed company chaired by former Chancellor Kwasi Kwarteng as it expands bitcoin strategy.

items.title: Clarity Act will benefit banks more than crypto, former CFTC chair says
items.summary: Former CFTC Chair Christopher Giancarlo says banks, more than crypto firms, need the stalled Digital Asset Market Clarity Act.

items.title: Bitflyer volume surges 200% past Binance, Coinbase as oil spike sends Nikkei sliding
items.summary: Bitflyer trading spiked even as Japan’s Nikkei tumbled, while Korea and Taiwan equities joined the broader Asian selloff.

items.title: Oil pulls back from 25% spike as G7 discusses emergency reserve release
items.summary: Crude oil futures on Hyperliquid dropped from $114 to $102 after reports that G7 finance ministers would discuss a joint release of strategic oil reserves to cool the price surge driven by the Iran conflict.

items.title: Using AI at work is causing ‘brain fry,’ researchers say
items.summary: Researchers found that some workers using AI in their roles reported a “mental hangover” with a “fog” that caused difficulty focusing.

items.title: U.S. isn’t really exposed to oil shocks and that might be helping bitcoin stay resilient
items.summary: Rising oil prices are shaking global markets, but the U.S. is largely insulated and bitcoin seems to be riding the wave alongside Wall Street.

items.title: Finance job openings fall to 13-year low as US economy loses 92K jobs
items.summary: Finance and insurance job listings declined towards the end of 2025, with The Kobeissi Letter arguing the sector should “brace” for job cuts.

items.title: Post-Quantum Shift Could Force Crypto Exchanges to Rethink Wallet Security
items.summary: New wallet research aims to preserve a core feature exchanges use to generate deposit addresses without exposing private keys.

items.title: BTC Markets eyes RWA trading license amid global tokenization wave
items.summary: The roughly $26 billion in tokenized assets onchain today “is really just the proof of concept,” said BTC Markets CEO Lucas Dobbins.

items.title: Aave Users Reach Record as Traders Quietly Shift Capital Toward DeFi Lending
items.summary: With fewer low-risk yield strategies in crypto, investors are turning to DeFi lending, sending Aave usage to record levels.

items.title: Bitcoin could face deeper downside as odds of U.S. market meltdown rise to 35%
items.summary: Veteran strategist Ed Yardeni raised his probability of a stock market crash this year as oil tops $100, the dollar posts its best week in a year, and the Iran conflict expands to Saudi Arabia.

items.title: Oil shorts on Hyperliquid get wiped out as crude surges 30% on Iran escalation
items.summary: Tokenized crude oil futures saw their largest liquidation event on crypto venues as the conflict expanded to Saudi Arabia and Gulf oil production collapsed.

items.title: Orbital data center company to start mining Bitcoin in space
items.summary: Starcloud plans to mine Bitcoin from orbit using ASIC hardware, arguing the economics of space computing favor specialized mining chips over GPUs.

items.title: Flow Foundation seeks court order to block FLOW delisting on Korean exchanges

items.title: Bitcoin correlation with tech stocks overblown: NYDIG

items.title: Treasury Urges Congress to Give Crypto Platforms Power to Freeze Suspicious Funds

items.title: Crypto regulatory clarity matters more for banks, ex-CFTC chief says
